title: Sysco Corporation 2025 Form 10-K
note: Primary filing for Sysco's fiscal 2025 business description, sales scale, profitability, risks, and operating model.

title: Sysco Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
note: Investor release summarizing fiscal 2025 revenue, net earnings, adjusted earnings, and management commentary.

title: Sysco Products
note: Official product page for Sysco's foodservice product categories and brand-oriented product offering.

title: Market capitalization of Sysco (SYY)
note: Market-cap source used for the current valuation metric and queued-manifest market-cap reference.

title: Sysco PE Ratio 2012-2026
note: Market-data source for Sysco's approximate trailing P/E ratio near the review date.

title: Open Food Network Software Platform
note: Documents the open-source platform's role in enabling producers, wholesalers, food hubs, and communities to sell and coordinate local food online.

title: Open Food Network GitHub Repository
note: Public source repository and project description for the Open Food Network marketplace software.

title: Open Food Facts API Documentation
note: API documentation for an open food product database that can support product transparency and comparison use cases.

title: Open Food Facts Server Repository
note: Public open-source server repository for Open Food Facts.
